title: lophiolepis boujartii subsp. boujartii
intro: Lophiolepis boujartii subsp. boujartii is a plant species, also known as Boujart's Lophiolepis or Boujart's Spiny Club Moss, belonging to the family Lycopodiaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant are derived from its spores, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lophiolepis boujartii subsp. boujartii include its antifungal and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating skin and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the spores in hot water or using them in the form of a decoction or tincture.
